title: Laravel 11 Release Pizza Party
description: Celebrate the release of Laravel 11 with fellow developers! We'll discuss new features, share experiences, and enjoy delicious pizza together. Perfect for both beginners and experienced Laravel developers.

title: Filament Admin Panel Workshop
description: Deep dive into Filament admin panels while enjoying pizza! Learn best practices, tips and tricks, and build a complete admin panel from scratch. Bring your laptop and questions!

title: Livewire 3 Pizza Meetup
description: Explore the power of Livewire 3 with the community! Share your projects, learn new techniques, and network with other developers. Pizza and drinks provided!

title: Laravel Beginner's Pizza Night
description: New to Laravel? Join us for a beginner-friendly evening! We'll cover the basics, answer questions, and help you get started with your first Laravel project.

title: Laravel Testing Best Practices
description: Master Laravel testing while enjoying pizza! Learn about PHPUnit, Pest, and testing strategies. Share your testing experiences and learn from others.

title: Laravel API Development Pizza Session
description: Build robust APIs with Laravel! Discuss REST, GraphQL, authentication, and best practices. Perfect for developers working on API projects.
